items.title: Rates-vol still rich vs macro uncertainty
items.summary: Front-end rates vol remains elevated versus realized growth shock dispersion. Favor selective short-vol carry only with hard event stops.

items.title: Dispersion remains a cleaner expression than index delta
items.summary: Single-name idiosyncratic dispersion is still outpacing index-level moves. Prefer relative-value books over outright beta risk.

items.title: HK autocallables: reinvestment discipline over coupon chasing
items.summary: In short-tenor wrapper flow, barrier management and reinvestment path-dependency dominate headline coupon optics.
